text: When administering medication, responders should consider that:

options.text: Right medication, right amount, right person, right time, right method.
Right nutrition, , right method, right time, right person, right amount
Right medication, right action, right person, right time, right responsibility
Right medication, right amount, right person, right responsibility, right action

explanation: The 'five rights' of medication administration are a global standard to ensure patient safety. They are the right medication, right amount, right person, right time, and right method of administration.
